title: Criminal
overview: Arjun and Mahi have been married for 4-5 years, but their relationship is not what it used to be. Now they are hellbent on divorcing each other. Their common friends, Gagan, and Jasleen, try to patch things up. While doing it they plan a holiday together which gets cancelled somehow. They come back not realizing that 5 prison escapes are now hiding in their house. In their own home, they become prisoners in hiding.
